title: The Soon-to-be Couple
overview: A blind girl and an invisible man go on a date.

title: The Great Date Plan
overview: Tonome and Yako go on a date to a tea shop run by a curious elf couple.

title: Dating for a Week
overview: Yako and Tonome draw boundaries at work and learn something about Kikira.

title: Don't Let Them Expose You
overview: The detective agency crew investigate an invisible woman accused of a crime, then take a camping trip.

title: It Was My First, So...
overview: Yako struggles with feeling childish compared to the cool and collected Tonome, and Karma pays a visit.

title: A Place Where I (You) Belong
overview: An undercover investigation leaves Jarashi feeling self-conscious about her body.

title: I Want You By My Side
overview: Tonome gets a lead on a job from a new acquaintance, but things spiral out of control.

title: I Guess I'm Being Selfish
overview: To prepare for their plan to move in together, Tonome invites Yako to stay the night at his house.

title: Being Who I Am
overview: A surprise stop in a hot springs town has Tonome investigating a supposed haunting in exchange for a room.

title: Before We Move In Together...
overview: The cohabitation plans continue with Tonome paying a visit to Yako's family.

title: The Invisible Person Village
overview: Yako visits Tonome's hometown and meets his family and dearest old friend.

title: A Big Moment
overview: A big day arrives for Tonome and Yako, as well as for Karma and Light.
